user.title: NRK TV
user.description: Choose how to set up NRK TV.

token.title: NRK Account
token.description: Paste the JSON output from the `nrk-token-helper` tool.

error.invalid_json: Could not parse the pasted text as JSON.
error.missing_fields: JSON is missing required fields (user_id, session_cookie).

abort.already_configured: This NRK account is already configured.

play_channel.name: Play NRK channel
play_channel.description: Resolves the live HLS stream URL for an NRK channel and plays it on a media player (e.g. Chromecast, smart TV).

channel_id.name: Channel ID
channel_id.description: NRK channel identifier (nrk1, nrk2, nrk3, nrksuper).

target.name: Media player
target.description: The media player entity to play the stream on.

resolve_stream.name: Resolve NRK stream URL
resolve_stream.description: Resolves the HLS stream URL for an NRK channel or on-demand program ID. Optionally plays it on a media player.

channel_id.name: Channel or program ID
channel_id.description: NRK channel ID (nrk1, nrk2, nrk3, nrksuper) or an on-demand program ID.

entity_id.name: Target media player
entity_id.description: Optional media player entity to start playback on after resolving the URL.
